vocab.meaning: người đọc sách nhiệt thành/mê đọc sách
vocab.example: I have been an avid reader since childhood, often finishing two or three novels a week.

vocab.meaning: khuynh hướng thoát ly thực tế qua văn học
vocab.example: For me, diving into a fantasy novel is the ultimate form of literary escapism after a stressful day.
Non-fiction books, especially biographies, really help to broaden my horizons regarding different cultures.
I prefer reading philosophy because it provides the intellectual stimulation I need to keep my mind sharp.

vocab.meaning: sự khao khát/thèm muốn đọc (cái gì đó) mãnh liệt
vocab.example: She has a voracious appetite for historical archives, spending hours in the library every weekend.

vocab.meaning: một cuốn sách cực kỳ lôi cuốn (khiến người đọc lật trang liên tục)
vocab.example: The latest thriller I bought is a real page-turner; I simply couldn't put it down until 2 AM.

vocab.meaning: những hiểu biết/cái nhìn sâu sắc
vocab.example: Classic literature often offers profound insights into human nature that remain relevant today.

vocab.meaning: đắm mình vào (một thế giới, một câu chuyện)
vocab.example: I love to embed myself in the intricate plot of a well-written mystery novel.
On Sunday mornings, I like to slowly peruse the Sunday times while enjoying a cup of coffee.

vocab.meaning: một trải nghiệm mang tính khai sáng
vocab.example: Reading about quantum physics was an enlightening experience that changed how I perceive the world.
